hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.xml) [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ] && case "$f" in "$PWD"/*) command -v xmllint >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f docs/shoptet-products-complete-v10.rng ] && { out=$(xmllint --relaxng docs/shoptet-products-complete-v10.rng "$f" --noout 2>&1) || { printf 'Shoptet XML validation failed for %s:\n%s\n' "$f" "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; };; esac;; esac; exit 0; }
